author: U.S. Department of Homeland Security
notes: Local image is a square crop of this DHS photo (taken 2024-09-18, DHS Flickr photo 54008815844, account DHSgov). Verified by visual comparison: identical frame (same smile, hair, pinstripe suit, dark background).

author: Anthony Quintano
notes: Local image is a tight head crop of this photo from the Facebook F8 2018 keynote (taken 2018-04-30). Verified by head-region pixel comparison (eyes, ear, hairline, blue stage background).

author: World Economic Forum (swiss-image.ch)
notes: Previous local image was traced exactly to Commons File:Melinda Gates 2014.jpg (Press Information Bureau / Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India), but its license is GODL-India, which is outside the approved whitelist (PD/CC0/CC BY/CC BY-SA), so the file was replaced. New image: center-cropped square head shot, resized to 460x460, from the WEF Annual Meeting 2011 photo (license-reviewed on Commons, cropped there from File:Bill & Melinda Gates, David Cameron - World Economic Forum Annual Meeting 2011.jpg, WEF Flickr).

author: Michel Temer (official Flickr of the Presidency of Brazil)
notes: Local image is a saturation-boosted square crop of this photo (visit to Bloomberg HQ, New York, 2016-09-19). Verified by head-region comparison including the distinctive white mark under his left eye and the same background person.

author: Gage Skidmore
notes: Local image is a tight head crop of this 2022-02-09 photo. Verified visually: identical smile, head angle, and distinctive yellow-green/black split backdrop.

author: Web Summit (photo: Harry Murphy/Web Summit via Sportsfile)
notes: Local image is a square crop of this Web Summit 2018 Forum-stage photo (2018-11-07). The retained original /tmp/ray_dalio_original.jpg carries matching Web Summit EXIF description and is the identical frame (same gesture, headset mic, FORUM backdrop).

author: startupofyou (Flickr account for Reid Hoffman's book The Startup of You)
notes: Local image is a tight head crop of this 2011-10-20 photo. License reviewed on Commons at upload (Flickr upload bot, reviewer Bbolkowy, 2012). Verified by head-region pixel comparison (same forehead mole, glasses glint, bokeh background).

author: JD Lasica
notes: Local image is a head crop of this photo from the Web 2.0 Conference, San Francisco (2005-10-07). FlickreviewR passed (cc-by-2.0). Verified by head-region comparison (same smile, hair curls, lavender O'Reilly backdrop, raised arm at right edge).

author: Martin Olsson (mnemo); derivative work by Off2riorob
notes: Local image is a square crop of this retouched derivative of File:Steve ballmer 2007 outdoors2.jpg. Verified visually: identical frame (outdoor green background, same expression). Also available under GFDL.

author: John Phillips (TechCrunch)
notes: Local image is a tight crop of this TechCrunch Disrupt London 2015 photo (2015-12-08, TechCrunch Flickr 22987802684). Verified visually: same headset mic, expression, and green TechCrunch-branded backdrop.

author: Aaron Friedman
notes: Local image is a tight head crop of this photo from a Fisher College of Business dinner with Buffett (2010-02-26, Flickr 4395161160). Verified by head-region comparison: identical flash glint on the left eyeglass lens, same squint, smile, and red paisley tie at collar.

author: n/a (generic vector-style silhouette, no photographic content)
license: n/a (non-photographic placeholder; simple geometric silhouette below threshold of originality)
notes: Verified visually: 958x958 generic gray head-and-shoulders silhouette avatar on a light gray background — the standard default-avatar shape, not a photo of any person. Left untouched.
